overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, following a character with a purple umbrella through neon-lit streets and narrow alleys. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections, atmospheric lighting, and dense urban environments characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection into the intimate, winding depths of a rain-soaked alleyway system. It begins at a bustling crossroads where massive holographic billboards cast light over wet streets and a black car passes by as the camera tracks a pedestrian with a purple umbrella. As the character steps onto the sidewalk, the scene shifts into a narrow commercial alley sheltered by awnings and glowing signs, including a prominent KNYSHA KING display reflected in the wet tiled floor. The path then winds further inward, transitioning from covered walkways to open cobblestone sections illuminated by red neon lanterns and rotating holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera follows the purple umbrella through moderate pedestrian traffic, turning corners as the environment becomes increasingly enclosed and atmospheric.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vast, open waterfront promenade into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins by sweeping across a breathtaking skyline of towering skyscrapers and holographic displays, gliding along the water's edge beneath a purple-lit pedestrian bridge. As the camera moves forward, the expansive view narrows, leading under the bridge and into a commercial alley where blue and pink hotel signs and red paper lanterns create a more enclosed atmosphere. The scene then shifts further into an extremely narrow corridor plastered with dense holographic advertisements and champagne billboards, weaving through pedestrians in the cramped space. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into this saturated urban canyon, ending with a view of the tight passage stretching ahead.
